heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 410ww–8 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this part.
notes: Amendments2000— struck out “: , That the amount to be appropriated for the operation, development or restoration of non-federally owned properties within the boundaries of the park shall not exceed $200,000” after “this part”.Pub. L. 106–356Provided
amendments: Amendments2000— struck out “: , That the amount to be appropriated for the operation, development or restoration of non-federally owned properties within the boundaries of the park shall not exceed $200,000” after “this part”.Pub. L. 106–356Provided
